posts.raw_content:
What is with this place lately? It's a nonstop Trump hate train. Go into the comments of any post and it's full of shills saying Trump is Israel's lapdog.  Enough already! These people are NOT and likely NEVER HAVE BEEN supporters. Everyone knows Trump and Israel are friends and have been since day one of term one. Who cares? But if you're a true supporter, you also Trust Trump, he always comes up on top and always has plans within plans. Israel might be finally getting the war they wanted, but it's not going to end the way they want it. Iran will be completely neutered, and probably this ends very soon (I personally think within days)

Anyway.

Mods, can you PLEASE resume the ban hammer smashy smashy? This is a never ending Trump rally, support or get the fuck out.

And NO we should not tolerate these shills. Anti Trump sentiment is literally everywhere else, this site ONLY has value if it has a wall 40ft high. Mods, they're scaling the fences, I think we need to build the wall 10ft higher.

Expect this post to get littered by the exact shills I mentioned. So feel free to start with them.

I've reported hundreds of accounts now, nothing seems to happen.
